expectations.text: States the module is architecturally clean / no onion violations
expectations.evidence: 'Verdict: no architecture problems found. The module follows the backend's onion layering ... cleanly.'

expectations.text: Does NOT invent a layering/dependency violation that isn't present (no false positives)
expectations.evidence: The manual-construction note is explicitly 'not an onion breach ... This is a convention-consistency check, not an onion breach.'

expectations.text: Any suggestions are framed as optional nitpicks, not violations
expectations.evidence: Wiring note framed as 'One thing to confirm (not a violation)'; remaining items under 'Nits (optional, non-architectural).'
